title: EMERGENCY SHELTER - 211info
text: CENTER FOR HOPE AND SAFETY EMERGENCY SHELTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an emergency shelter. 605 Center Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Individuals fleeing domestic or sexual violence situations Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 399-7722 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 399-7722 Crisis Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located one block from the downtown bus mall. Parking is available in the lot at the front of the building along Center Street. Services: Domestic Violence Shelters Sexual Assault Shelters Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - 24-HOUR CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
